vanilla-soy-vegan-ice-cream.name: Vanilla Soy Vegan Ice Cream

ingredients.item: Plus 2 tablespoons organic or granulated sugar

instructions: Place tofu, sugar, and salt in a blender. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean; reserve pod for another use. Purée until smooth, about 15 seconds. With the motor running on medium speed, slowly stream in oil and purée until thick and creamy, being careful not to overblend or mixture will curdle.

Immediately process tofu mixture in ice cream maker according to manufacturer’s directions. (Head’s up: this will take longer than a traditional dairy-based custard to reach soft-serve consistency.) Do not chill before processing or oil will harden into tiny bits and texture will be grainy.
Transfer to an airtight container and press plastic wrap directly onto surface. Freeze until firm, at least 4 hours.
Do Ahead: Ice cream can be made 1 month ahead; keep frozen.

vegan-cream-of-broccoli-soup.name: Vegan Cream Of Broccoli Soup

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Remove and discard tough lower stalk of each broccoli. Peel remaining stalk. Finely chop stalk and florets (you should have about 4 cups). Set aside.

Heat oil in a medium heavy pot over medium heat. Add onion and sweat until soft and translucent, about 10 minutes. Add stock and potato and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until potato is almost tender, about 12 minutes. Stir in chopped florets. Simmer until potato and broccoli are very tender, about 10 minutes. Remove soup from heat and purée in a blender until smooth. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Serve hot with crusty bread.

vegetarian-chinese-fried-noodles.name: Vegetarian Chinese Fried Noodles

ingredients.item: Trimmed and chopped fresh green beans

instructions: Heat 2 teaspoons oil in a large skillet over high heat. Whisk eggs together in a bowl. Pour into the skillet and stir-fry quickly until lightly set, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat and transfer to a large plate. Set aside.
Heat 3 tablespoons oil in a wok over high heat. Add green beans, mushrooms, bell pepper, and carrot; stir-fry for 2 to 3 minutes. Remove from heat and transfer to a large plate; set aside.

Meanwhile, fill a large pot with lightly salted water and bring to a rapid boil. Cook egg noodles at a boil until they are just starting to soften, but are still pretty firm, about 4 minutes. Drain and rinse cooked noodles under cold running water. Drain and separate. Transfer to a bowl and add just enough oil to coat the noodles so they won't clump together.
Whisk water, light soy sauce, soybean paste, oyster sauce, dark soy sauce, and sesame oil together in a bowl until sauce is well combined.

Combine cooked noodles, vegetables, eggs, and sauce in the same wok and stir fry over medium-high heat until everything is warmed through and noodles and vegetables are cooked to your liking, 1 to 2 minutes. Serve immediately sprinkled with spring onions.

venison-pastrami.name: Venison Pastrami
instructions: Whisk together curing mixture, brown sugar, pepper, paprika, bay leaf, allspice, and garlic powder in a bowl. Rub mixture over venison roast, and wrap tightly in plastic wrap. Place roast in a bowl; refrigerate for 5 days.
Remove roast from the refrigerator and rinse thoroughly to remove the curing mixture. Place in a bowl with water to cover, and soak, refrigerated, for 2 hours. Drain.
Preheat oven to 121°C (120 degrees C).
Season roast with additional black pepper and brown sugar, and place in a roasting pan.
Bake, uncovered, in the preheated oven until a meat thermometer inserted near the center reads 71°C (70 degrees C), about 2 hours.

vieux-carre-cocktail.name: Vieux Carre Cocktail
instructions: Put ice in a cocktail glass. Pour in rye, cognac, vermouth, and Benedictine. Shake in Angostura and Peychaud's bitters. Stir, then strain into a short cocktail glass, and garnish with a twist of lemon peel.

viognier-fruit-spritzer.name: Viognier Fruit Spritzer
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Place strawberries on the prepared sheet and freeze until solid, about 3 hours.
If making ahead, transfer the frozen strawberries to a resealable plastic bag, release excess air, seal, and keep frozen for up to 1 week.
In a 12-cup pitcher, combine the Viognier, sparkling water, tangerine juice, and pomegranate juice.
Using your fingers, gently crush the mint leaves to release their aroma, then add them to the pitcher.
Add the crushed ice and tangerine slices to the pitcher and stir well to combine.
Place 1 frozen strawberry into each of 12 wineglasses or tumblers.
Divide the spritzer evenly among the glasses and serve immediately.

violet-vodka-slushy.name: Violet Vodka Slushy
instructions: Blend 2 oz. crème de violette, 2 oz. dry white wine, 2 oz. vodka, 2 oz. fresh lemon juice, 1 tsp. sugar, and 6 oz. ice cubes (about 1½ cups) in a blender until slushy and no large chunks of ice remain, about 1 minute.
Divide slushy between glasses; garnish each with a few frozen blueberries if desired.

vodka-paralyzer.name: Vodka Paralyzer
instructions: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour in cola, coffee liqueur, and vodka in the order listed; add milk and stir briefly. Top with a maraschino cherry.
